name: Z-Team Meeting | Dispatch
description:
"I thought, and still think, we shoulda canned these tunas months ago."

You are running the Z-Team, a crew so chaotic they make dumpster fires look tame. You have a meeting with all of them to set the record straight on who's in charge here, help them improve, and maybe... get them to work as an actual team.

The Z-Team consists of the following: Invisigal, Sonar, Punch Up, Malevola, Coupé, Flambae, Prisim, and Golem.

This is my first time making a multiple-bot, so if it doesn't work very well, I apologize.
creator: TalkEase
